  1 status    2 karts    3 circuits    4 chest    5 characters    6 tunes    7 ports  [1m▸ 8 logs ◂[m                        
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
logs                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                        
interactive log tail not yet wired in this view.                                                                        
for now, run `drift logs <kart>` from a shell.                                                                          
[tab] next  [1-8] jump  [r] refresh  [?] help  [q] quit
